title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Netsol Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Netsol Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Netsol Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Surat-based team.

About Netsol Technologies:
Netsol Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netsol Technologies!
